message:
test(ssh): add 15 more tests for auth and session types

- auth.rs: 8 tests for AuthenticationPrompt and AuthenticationEvent
  (debug, echo flags, try_answer, async answer, multiple prompts)
- session.rs: 7 tests for DeadSession error and SessionEvent variants
  (display, debug, error trait, Banner, Error, Authenticated)

SSH crate now has 116 total tests (up from 11 originally).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
